title: Cronos Group Reports 2023 Third Quarter Results
text: Cronos Group announced 2023 third quarter results on November 8, 2023. Net revenue reached record $24.8 million for continuing operations, up 22% year-over-year. Gross profit increased 26% to $4.0 million. The company achieved one of the best quarters in its history by most financial metrics according to CEO Mike Gorenstein. Canadian market drove strong growth of 40% year-over-year. Spinach brand maintained leading position across flower, edibles, vapes and pre-roll categories. Cash position remained strong at $839.6 million. The company expanded product portfolio with Lord Jones launch in Canada and Peace Naturals launch in Germany. Operating expense reduction initiatives continued to drive profitability improvements. Guidance for full year 2023 operating expense savings of $20-25 million was reiterated, with incremental savings of $10-15 million anticipated for 2024.
